parameters.query: INSERT INTO seasonality_signals (asset, month, avg_return, win_rate, sample_years, current_bias, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (asset, month) DO UPDATE SET avg_return = $3, win_rate = $4, current_bias = $6, updated_at = NOW();
